channel.title: The Red Canoe · Live Dispatches
channel.description: Satellite messages from Violette and Stan — La Vérendrye canoe expedition, July 2026.

item.title: 2/2 Changed into dry clothes, eat and ready for a good night. Tonight the sun came back in an amazing sunset. · 📍 47.8183, -77.0816
item.description: 2/2 Changed into dry clothes, eat and ready for a good night. Tonight the sun came back in an amazing sunset. · 📍 47.8183, -77.0816

item.title: 1/2 It is so wild, immense, beautiful. First day mix of rivers, streams, lacs. Sun, wind (back) and rain. Arrived at camp drenched. Set up bug net and tarp. · 📍 47.8183, -77.0816
item.description: 1/2 It is so wild, immense, beautiful. First day mix of rivers, streams, lacs. Sun, wind (back) and rain. Arrived at camp drenched. Set up bug net and tarp. · 📍 47.8183, -77.0816

item.title: Made it to Montreal, picked up Violette, and now driving to our first camp 2 hours northwest of Montreal. · 📍 45.5289, -73.5788
item.description: Made it to Montreal, picked up Violette, and now driving to our first camp 2 hours northwest of Montreal. · 📍 45.5289, -73.5788

item.title: In the Adirondack less than 2hrs from Montreal. Left the rain behind. · 📍 44.0140, -73.7050
item.description: In the Adirondack less than 2hrs from Montreal. Left the rain behind. · 📍 44.0140, -73.7050

item.title: The canoe is safely secured on the car, and we are ready to hit the road. · 📍 40.3658, -74.6367
item.description: The canoe is safely secured on the car, and we are ready to hit the road. · 📍 40.3658, -74.6367

item.title: We are taking the road on Tuesday! · 📍 40.3658, -74.6372
item.description: We are taking the road on Tuesday! · 📍 40.3658, -74.6372
